category_sources: Official lsof documentation says lsof is a command for listing open files.
source_facts.description: Utility to list open files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and Read the Docs site use lsof / LiSt Open Files.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links to lsof.readthedocs.io as the dedicated documentation site.
Read the Docs site includes getting started, tutorial, options, FAQ, and manpage sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs list use cases for finding open files, blocking processes, sockets, and files open by PID/user/command.
